owner: TCEL (multi-manager trading, treasury, banking-risk, capital allocation)
description: TCEL Tenant-9 Foundation package (T9-001), onboarded into the ECARMF kernel as knowledge-package metadata - NOT bespoke code. Master data (LegalEntity, Manager) become entity declarations; the EF-001..012 deterministic control catalog becomes executable rules where the declarative condition model allows (status/boolean/threshold controls) and a traceability knowledge asset for the full catalog (controls needing registry lookup, uniqueness, or cross-field comparison are carried but not yet enforceable as simple rules - noted for a richer-condition pass). First of the four packages present in the Structure-v1 handoff (T9-001..004). Boundary vs later packages: this package owns ONLY foundational master data, roles, and enterprise-wide governance controls; banking is T9-002, trading is T9-003, enterprise risk is T9-004.
name: TCEL Enterprise Foundation

entities.description: A TCEL legal entity (T9-001 legal-entity.schema.json). legalEntityId is referenced across T9-002/006/019.
A TCEL investment manager (T9-001 manager.schema.json). managerId (MGR-NN) is the single most-referenced entity in the tenant.

events.description: A record has been durably persisted and is ready for rule/KPI evaluation.
Role assigned to a user or service account.
Privileged or emergency account access granted.

rules.name: Legal entity closed with open obligations
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: General Counsel/CFO). Block closure while obligations remain open.
rules.reasonTemplate: EF-012: legal entity {legalEntityId} has {openObligations} open obligation(s) - closure blocked (General Counsel/CFO).

rules.name: Enterprise configuration changed without approval
rules.reasonTemplate: EF-011: enterprise configuration '{configKey}' changed without approval - rejected and alerted (Platform).

rules.name: Privileged access without MFA
rules.reasonTemplate: EF-009: privileged access for {userId} denied - MFA is not enabled on the account (Security).

rules.name: Governed record missing metadata
rules.reasonTemplate: EF-010: governed record is missing required metadata fields - creation rejected (Data Governance).

rules.name: Expired policy still active
rules.description: Detective/High (Owner: Data Governance). Escalate to policy owner.
rules.reasonTemplate: EF-008: policy {policyId} is expired but still active - escalated to the policy owner (Data Governance).

capabilities.name: TCEL Enterprise Foundation
capabilities.description: Master data (legal entities, managers), enterprise governance controls, and the roles/committees registry for the TCEL tenant.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL Enterprise Foundation Control Catalog (EF-001..012)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 12 deterministic EF- controls. EF-008/009/010/011/012 are enforced as executable rules in this package; EF-001..007 require registry lookup, uniqueness, or cross-field comparison beyond the declarative condition model and are carried here for traceability pending a richer-condition pass.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: EF-001 Unregistered legal entity referenced | Preventive | Reject downstream reference | Critical | General Counsel. EF-002 Unregistered manager referenced | Preventive | Reject downstream reference | Critical | Manager Oversight. EF-003 Duplicate master-data ID minted outside T9-001 | Preventive | Reject and alert | Critical | Data Governance. EF-004 Role not found in registry used in a control-catalog Owner field | Detective | Flag for reconciliation | High | Data Governance. EF-005 Committee referenced without charter on file | Detective | Flag for reconciliation | High | Corporate Secretary. EF-006 Approval matrix threshold missing for a decision type | Preventive | Block decision workflow activation | Critical | Platform. EF-007 Manager self-approval of own authority change | Preventive | Reject | Critical | CRO. EF-008 Expired policy still active | Detective | Escalate to policy owner | High | Data Governance. EF-009 User identity without MFA on privileged account | Preventive | Deny access | Critical | Security. EF-010 Metadata fields missing on a governed record | Preventive | Reject creation | High | Data Governance. EF-011 Enterprise configuration changed without approval | Preventive | Reject and alert | Critical | Platform. EF-012 Legal entity closed with open obligations | Preventive | Block closure | Critical | General Counsel/CFO.
